title: Extend top_n task binding to the TDD phase: predicates may only target triage-committed slugs (3rd occurrence of tdd-predicates-exceed-triage-committed-scope)
summary: topngate (shipped 655, enforce) binds the BUILD report to triage ## top_n - it does not bind TDD. Cycle 660: triage committed an EMPTY top_n (lane item already landed in 659) and correctly declined scout's out-of-lane fallback pick, but TDD had already authored three RED scaffolds for that rejected slug; the build honored the empty top_n (gate working) yet the orphan RED scaffolds broke go test and the build report falsely certified them removed ('already removed by a concurrent actor' - they were not). Cycle FAILed on a no-op. Lesson corpus already holds tdd-predicates-exceed-triage-committed-scope x2; 660 makes 3 distinct cycles.
root_cause: Same single-task-authority disease as builder-task-binding, one phase earlier: TDD binds to scout's proposals (it runs from scout-report context) with no deterministic check that its authored predicate/test files belong to a triage-committed slug. Empty top_n = author NOTHING is not enforced either. Secondary: build-report tree-state claims are not verified against the actual worktree (false 'cleaned up' certification passed review).
fix: Two parts: (1) Extend the topngate mechanism (internal/topngate, mirror its gate.go/reviewer.go shape) to the tdd->build transition: the TDD report's declared task slug(s) and any authored go/acs/cycleN + *_test.go paths must belong to triage ## top_n; empty top_n => TDD must author nothing (no-op PASS) - violation blocks with abort_reason. NOTE phase ORDER: verify when tdd runs relative to triage in the routing plan; if tdd can be scheduled before triage on some plans, the gate belongs at whichever transition follows triage commitment. (2) Deterministic tree-claim check at build-selfcheck: if the build report claims file removals/cleanups, verify via git status/ls the named paths are actually absent - false certification becomes a deterministic phase FAIL, not an audit-time discovery.
acceptance: Regression test reproducing cycle-660: empty top_n + TDD-authored scaffolds for a non-committed slug => blocked at the gate with abort_reason (table-driven: committed-slug predicates pass)
Build report claiming a removal that did not happen fails build-selfcheck deterministically
go test -race on touched packages PASS; apicover clean
source: operator-injection from cycle-660 retrospective (3rd distinct-cycle occurrence)
